svg.title: Microservices event-driven architecture diagram
svg.desc: Shows React frontend connecting through an API Gateway to Products, Orders, and Payments services, with async communication via a message broker and a Notification service.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the React frontend and how it calls the API Gateway')
sendPrompt('What does the API Gateway do in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Products Service and its responsibilities')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Orders Service and what events it publishes')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Payments Service and what events it consumes and publishes')
sendPrompt('What message broker would you use here and how does it work?')
sendPrompt('What does the Notification Service do and what events does it consume?')
